test.name: CT-00 - Validação visualizar página inicial

kw.name: Abrir Sessao
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.msg: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.
kw.status: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
Abre o navegador na URL com opções otimizadas para CI/CD.
kw.status: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'

kw.name: Fechar Sessao
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Tira uma evidência e fecha o navegador ao final do teste.

test.status: Setup failed: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'
